name: KrillApp.Server.LLM
title: LLM
description: Connects to a local Ollama LLM service running on the server. Sends chat messages via HTTP POST to the Ollama API endpoint and receives AI-generated responses. Supports conversation history and can include selected node context in prompts. Responses are delivered via the event stream.
shortDescription: Connects to a local Ollama LLM service for AI-assisted server automation.
llmPurpose: Sends chat messages to a local Ollama LLM service and receives AI-generated responses for server automation assistance.
llmBehavior: sends HTTP POST to Ollama API at localhost:{port}/api/chat
includes selected node context in prompts
receives and posts LLM responses via event stream
llmOutputs: LLM response text via event stream
llmTypicalUseCases: ask AI to explain server configuration
llmCreationHints: Create an LLM node under a Server when the user wants AI-assisted interaction with that server. Requires Ollama to be running on the server. Configure the port (default 11434) and model name.

llmConnectionHints.role: leaf action node that communicates with external LLM service

llmExamples: Set up AI chat on this server.
Connect to the Ollama model on this Raspberry Pi.
Ask the LLM to explain my automation setup.
